chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.318 of 2016 (Dr. Abdul Qadir Akhund Vs. Ms. Shahila Perveen) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.3972/2016 (U/S 5). 2. For order on office objection a/w reply as at ‘A’. 3 For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.3973/2016 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 13.01.2025 None present for the appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. An issue of maintainability of this appeal is pending ever since this appeal was filed in the year 2016 and that has not been responded to. Today no one is in attendance to respond to those queries. Dismissed for non-prosecution. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
